title: P0-1 using-fabric pre-action gating (skill/bootstrap)
description: Strengthen skill + bootstrap pre-action discipline so agents gate on fab_recall before edits. Checklist lives in skill/bootstrap only — no new permanent Stop-hook gate (KT-DEC-0007).
action: Add an explicit numbered pre-action gating checklist (1. fab_recall(paths=[...], session_id=...) before Edit/Write; 2. optional body Read of entries[].read_path; 3. dismissed: <id> (<reason>) when skipping) to packages/cli/templates/skills/fabric-recall-playbook/SKILL.md and mirror the same MUST rule in packages/cli/templates/skills/lib/shared-policy.md + both ZH/EN arms of packages/shared/src/templates/bootstrap-canonical.ts; keep PreToolUse soft-nudge language (never decision:block).

criteria: packages/cli/templates/skills/fabric-recall-playbook/SKILL.md contains a numbered pre-action checklist that includes the exact string `fab_recall(paths=` and `session_id=` before edit language
packages/cli/templates/skills/lib/shared-policy.md contains pre-action MUST language referencing fab_recall before Edit/Write
packages/shared/src/templates/bootstrap-canonical.ts ZH and EN sections both contain explicit pre-action gating wording (not only cite-policy prose)
rg -n "decision:block|decision\s*:\s*block" packages/cli/templates/hooks/fabric-hint.cjs packages/cli/templates/skills returns no new permanent gate for missing recall
convergence.verification: pnpm --filter @fenglimg/fabric-shared test -- bootstrap-canonical bootstrap-parity; rg -n 'pre-action|Before editing|修改任何文件前' packages/cli/templates/skills packages/shared/src/templates/bootstrap-canonical.ts; pnpm --filter @fenglimg/fabric-cli test -- fabric-hint-never-blocks
convergence.definition_of_done: Agents reading bootstrap/skills get a concrete pre-edit fab_recall checklist without any new hard Stop/PreToolUse block.

files.change: Upgrade existing 'Before editing files' bullets into a numbered checklist with fab_recall(paths=[...], session_id=...), body Read path, and dismissed override; keep soft-nudge only
Add MUST pre-action gate sentence: call fab_recall before Edit/Write when knowledge might apply; no hook permanent block

files.target: ZH/EN 行为规则 + cite policy
files.change: Add explicit pre-action gating checklist line(s) under 行为规则 / Behaviour rules, retaining KT-DEC-0007 nudge-not-gate language
Assert generated bootstrap text contains pre-action checklist anchors (fab_recall + before edit / 修改任何文件前 + session_id)
Extend parity keys if new section headings are introduced so ZH/EN stay in lockstep

implementation: Read fabric-recall-playbook/SKILL.md and promote 'Before editing files' into a numbered Pre-action gating checklist with: (1) fab_recall(paths=[files], session_id=...), (2) optional native Read of entries[].read_path, (3) dismissed: <id> (scope-mismatch|outdated|not-applicable|other:<text>)
Mirror the MUST in shared-policy.md without inventing new MCP tools
In bootstrap-canonical.ts, add matching checklist bullets to both ZH and EN template strings under 行为规则 / Behaviour rules; keep PreToolUse soft-nudge sentence citing KT-DEC-0007
Update bootstrap-canonical.test.ts + bootstrap-parity.test.ts to assert checklist anchors exist in both languages
Do NOT edit fabric-hint.cjs to introduce decision:block for missing recall

success_metrics: no new decision:block gate for missing recall

reference.pattern: Existing bootstrap cite/self-archive policy style (lean checklist, bilingual string templates)
reference.examples: SKILL.md lines ~12-31 already require fab_recall before editing — elevate to numbered checklist

rationale.chosen_approach: Skill/bootstrap gating is the peer micro-transfer of Superpowers/using-fabric discipline without morphing Fabric into a task engine or hard hook gate.
decision_factors: R1 highest-value peer transfer from same-space analysis
rationale.tradeoffs: Checklist is soft policy; non-compliant agents can still skip unless human/skill enforces — acceptable vs Stop-hook flood risk

risks: Risk: executor may add PreToolUse block — mitigate by convergence criterion forbidding decision:block for missing recall (KT-DEC-0007)
Risk: ZH/EN bootstrap parity drift — mitigate via bootstrap-parity tests
